title: Job Opening Teacher at Mumbai University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Mumbai University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
